title: iberis umbellata subsp. grenieri
intro: Iberis umbellata subsp. grenieri, also known as the alpine candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the cress family, Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iberis umbellata subsp. grenieri include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress, while also possessing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
